hero_subtitle: The definitive platform for voters worldwide. Secure, interactive, and inclusive.
assistant_welcome: Hello! I am your AI election assistant. How can I help you today?
assistant_placeholder: Ask about voting steps, dates, or registration...
step_1: Verify your name in the Voter List.
step_3: Carry a valid ID and cast your vote on the machine.
assistant_complaint: You can file a formal complaint in the 'Complaint & Redressal' section of your dashboard. Our officers review them within 24-48 hours.
assistant_verify: Identity verification is done using biometrics or a secure digital signature during the voting process. Check your 'Quick Stats' for status.
assistant_default: I'm not sure about that. Could you please rephrase? You can ask about voting, registration, or complaints.
roadmap_step_1_desc: Ensure your details are up-to-date in the electoral roll.
roadmap_step_2_desc: Review the candidates and their manifestos.
roadmap_step_3_desc: Candidates present their visions to the public.
roadmap_step_4_desc: Cast your vote securely at your designated polling station.
roadmap_step_5_desc: Official counting and announcement of results.
vote_success: Thank you! Your vote has been recorded securely.
assistant_help_process: Tell me about the election process
assistant_help_steps: What are the steps to vote?
evm_session_closed: Session closed. Please exit the booth area.
evm_success_msg: Your selection has been encrypted and recorded on the blockchain.
evm_about_to_cast: You are about to cast your vote for
evm_action_final: This action is final and cannot be reversed.
